option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <title>Gran Conquista</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Press+Start+2P&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
        :root{
            --sky:#5BC8E8;--sky-dark:#3A9EBE;--sky-light:#A8E4F5;
            --pink:#F4A7C3;--pink-dark:#D4729A;--pink-light:#FFD6E8;
            --rose:#E8527A;--rose-dark:#C03060;
            --gold:#F0C040;--gold-dark:#C89020;
            --black:#1A1020;--white:#FFF8FF;--bg:#0D0816;
            --px:'Press Start 2P',monospace;
            --guide-font: clamp(10px,2.8vw,12px);
            --guide-title-font: clamp(12px,3.4vw,16px);
        }
        html,body{width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg);font-family:var(--px);touch-action:manipulation;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}

        /* ══ SCREENS ══ */
        .screen{position:fixed;inset:0;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden}
        .screen.active{display:flex}

        /* ══ BUTTONS ══ */
        .btn{font-family:var(--px);font-size:clamp(9px,3vw,13px);border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:clamp(12px,3vw,16px) clamp(22px,5vw,38px);position:relative;letter-spacing:1px;transition:transform .06s;min-width:clamp(190px,55vw,250px);text-align:center}
        .btn:active{transform:translateY(3px)}
        .btn-pink{background:var(--pink);color:var(--black);box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 var(--pink-dark),inset 3px 3px 0 var(--pink-light),0 5px 0 var(--rose-dark),0 7px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}
        .btn-pink:hover{background:var(--pink-light)}
        .btn-sky{background:var(--sky-dark);color:var(--white);box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 #2A7A9E,inset 3px 3px 0 var(--sky-light),0 5px 0 #1A5A7E,0 7px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}
        .btn-sky:hover{background:var(--sky-light);color:var(--black)}
        .btn-gold{background:var(--gold);color:var(--black);box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 var(--gold-dark),inset 3px 3px 0 #FFF0A0,0 5px 0 #906010,0 7px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}
        .btn-gold:hover{background:#FFF0A0}
        .btn-sm{font-size:clamp(7px,2.2vw,10px);padding:clamp(9px,2.2vw,12px) clamp(14px,3.5vw,20px);min-width:0}
        .btn:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none}

        /* ══ S1: INICIO ══ */
        #s-inicio{background:var(--bg)}
        #sword-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;opacity:.12;pointer-events:none}
        .inicio-content{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:clamp(24px,6vh,48px)}
        .title-frame{padding:clamp(22px,5vw,40px) clamp(32px,7vw,70px);text-align:center;position:relative}
        .title-main{font-size:clamp(24px,8vw,56px);color:var(--gold);text-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(--rose-dark),6px 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.7);line-height:1.35;animation:glow 3s ease-in-out infinite}
        @keyframes glow{0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(240,192,64,0.25))}50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(240,192,64,0.9))}}
        .menu-btns{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:clamp(12px,3vh,18px);align-items:center}

        /* ══ S2: LIBRO CERRADO ══ */
        #s-libro-cerrado{background:var(--bg);cursor:pointer}
        .book-closed-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:clamp(14px,3vh,24px)}
        .book-float{animation:bookFloat 2.5s ease-in-out infinite}
        @keyframes bookFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px)}}
        .guide-title{font-size:var(--guide-title-font);color:var(--pink-light);text-shadow:2px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.85);text-align:center;line-height:2}
        .click-hint{font-size:clamp(7px,2vw,9px);color:var(--pink);animation:blink 1.2s step-end infinite;letter-spacing:2px}
        @keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}

        /* ══ S3: LIBRO ABIERTO ══ */
        #s-libro-abierto{background:var(--bg);padding:clamp(8px,2vw,16px);overflow-y:auto;justify-content:center;align-items:center}
        .book-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:min(700px,96vw);margin:0 auto}
        @media(min-width:580px){.book-wrap{flex-direction:row;height:min(560px,86vh)}}
        .bk-left{background:#FFF8F0;border:3px solid var(--pink-dark);padding:clamp(14px,3vw,26px) clamp(12px,2.5vw,20px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0}
        @media(min-width:580px){.bk-left{width:36%;border-right:2px solid #D4B080;border-bottom:none}}
        @media(max-width:579px){.bk-left{border-bottom:2px solid #D4B080}}
        .bk-right{flex:1;background:#FFFDF5;border:3px solid var(--pink-dark);border-top:none;padding:clamp(14px,3vw,22px);overflow-y:auto}
        @media(min-width:580px){.bk-right{border-left:none;border-top:3px solid var(--pink-dark)}}
        .bk-l-title{font-size:var(--guide-title-font);color:#5A3010;text-align:center;line-height:2}
        .bk-l-deco{font-size:var(--guide-font);color:var(--pink-dark);text-align:center;line-height:2;margin-top:4px}
        .idx-title{font-size:var(--guide-title-font);color:#5A3010;margin-bottom:12px;text-align:center;line-height:2;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:2px dashed #D4B080}
        .idx-item{display:block;width:100%;font-family:var(--px);font-size:var(--guide-font);color:#3A1A60;padding:clamp(10px,2.3vw,14px) 10px;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;background:none;text-align:left;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:3px}
        .idx-item:hover,.idx-item:active{background:#FFF0E0;border-color:#D4B080;color:#5A3010}
        .idx-item::before{content:'⚔ ';color:var(--rose)}
        .ct-heading{font-size:var(--guide-title-font);color:#5A3010;margin-bottom:12px;line-height:2;border-bottom:2px dashed #D4B080;padding-bottom:6px}
        .ct-p{font-size:var(--guide-font);color:#2A1A10;line-height:2.6;margin-bottom:8px}
        .ct-p b{color:#8B1A1A}
        .bk-nav{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
        .bk-btn{font-family:var(--px);font-size:var(--guide-font);border:none;padding:clamp(8px,1.8vw,11px) clamp(12px,2.5vw,16px);cursor:pointer}
        .bk-btn-pink{background:var(--pink);color:var(--black);box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(--pink-dark)}
        .bk-btn-sky{background:var(--sky-dark);color:var(--white);box-shadow:0 3px 0 #1A5A7E}
        .bk-btn:active{transform:translateY(2px);box-shadow:none}

        /* ══ S4: JUGADORES ══ */
        #s-players{background:var(--black);position:fixed;inset:0;overflow:hidden}
        .pl-wrap{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
        @media(min-width:500px){.pl-wrap{flex-direction:row}}
        .pl-half{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:clamp(12px,3vh,22px);padding:clamp(16px,4vw,40px) clamp(16px,4vw,36px);padding-bottom:clamp(80px,14vh,110px)}
        .pl-1{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0A3A6A,#1A5A9E 60%,#2A7ABE)}
        .pl-2{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#6A0A40,#A02060 60%,#D03080)}
        .pl-divh{width:100%;height:4px;background:var(--black);flex-shrink:0}
        .pl-divv{width:4px;height:100%;background:var(--black);flex-shrink:0}
        @media(min-width:500px){.pl-divh{display:none}}
        @media(max-width:499px){.pl-divv{display:none}}
        .cmd{animation:bobble 2s ease-in-out infinite}
        .cmd2{animation-delay:.6s}
        @keyframes bobble{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}}
        .pl-label{font-size:clamp(10px,3.5vw,16px);letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--pink-light);text-shadow:2px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);text-align:center}
        .pl-input{font-family:var(--px);font-size:clamp(9px,2.8vw,13px);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);border:3px solid var(--pink);color:var(--white);padding:clamp(10px,2.5vw,14px) clamp(12px,3vw,16px);outline:none;width:clamp(170px,50vw,230px);text-align:center}
        .pl-input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);font-size:clamp(6px,1.8vw,9px)}
        .start-wrap{position:fixed;bottom:clamp(16px,4vh,36px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:20;white-space:nowrap}

        /* ══ S5: JUEGO ══ */
        /* En móvil: columna (mapa arriba, panel abajo cuando abre como overlay)
           En escritorio (>=640px): fila (mapa izq, panel der siempre visible) */
        #s-game{
            flex-direction:row;
            align-items:stretch;
            padding:0;
            position:fixed;
            inset:0;
            display:none; /* se activa con .active */
        }
        #s-game.active{display:flex}

        /* Flecha volver */
        .back-arrow{
            position:fixed;top:12px;left:12px;z-index:30;
            width:clamp(36px,8vw,44px);height:clamp(36px,8vw,44px);
            background:rgba(13,8,22,0.88);
            border:2px solid var(--pink);
            box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(--rose-dark),0 5px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            cursor:pointer;font-size:clamp(14px,4vw,20px);
            color:var(--pink-light);transition:transform .06s;
        }
        .back-arrow:active{transform:translateY(3px);box-shadow:0 1px 0 var(--rose-dark)}

        /* ── MAPA ── ocupa todo el espacio restante */
        .gmap{
            flex:1;
            position:relative;
            overflow:hidden;
            background:#2A6A3A;
            min-width:0;
            min-height:0;
        }

        /* Chip turno actual sobre el mapa */
        .map-player-chip{
            position:absolute;top:12px;left:58px;z-index:8;
            background:rgba(13,8,22,0.88);
            border:2px solid var(--gold);
            padding:clamp(5px,1.5vw,8px) clamp(8px,2vw,12px);
            display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:2px;
        }
        .mpc-label{font-size:clamp(5px,1.4vw,7px);color:var(--pink);letter-spacing:1px}
        .mpc-name{font-size:clamp(8px,2.5vw,12px);color:var(--gold)}
        .mpc-round{font-size:clamp(5px,1.3vw,6.5px);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)}

        /* Botón Panel — solo visible en móvil */
        .panel-toggle{
            position:fixed;
            bottom:14px;right:14px;z-index:20;
            font-family:var(--px);
            font-size:clamp(8px,2.5vw,11px);
            background:rgba(13,8,22,0.92);
            border:2px solid var(--pink);
            color:var(--pink-light);
            padding:clamp(10px,2.5vw,13px) clamp(14px,3.5vw,20px);
            cursor:pointer;
            box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(--rose-dark),0 5px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            transition:transform .06s;
            white-space:nowrap;
            letter-spacing:1px;
        }
        .panel-toggle:active{transform:translateY(3px);box-shadow:0 1px 0 var(--rose-dark)}
        @media(min-width:640px){.panel-toggle{display:none}}

        /* ── PANEL LATERAL ──
           Móvil: overlay desde abajo, oculto por defecto
           Escritorio: sidebar fija a la derecha, siempre visible */
        .gside{
            background:var(--black);
            display:flex;flex-direction:column;
            overflow:hidden;
            flex-shrink:0;
            z-index:25;
        }

        /* MÓVIL: panel como hoja que sube desde abajo */
        @media(max-width:639px){
            .gside{
                position:fixed;
                left:0;right:0;bottom:0;
                height:clamp(260px,50vh,380px);
                border-top:3px solid var(--pink-dark);
                transform:translateY(100%);
                transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
            }
            .gside.open{transform:translateY(0)}
        }

        /* ESCRITORIO: sidebar fija a la derecha, siempre visible */
        @media(min-width:640px){
            .gside{
                width:clamp(230px,28vw,280px);
                border-left:3px solid var(--pink-dark);
                height:100%;
                transform:none !important;
            }
        }

        /* Cabecera del panel */
        .side-hdr{
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--rose-dark),var(--rose));
            padding:clamp(8px,2vw,13px);
            border-bottom:2px solid var(--pink);
            flex-shrink:0;
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;
        }
        .side-hdr-text{flex:1;text-align:center}
        .side-close-btn{
            font-family:var(--px);font-size:clamp(7px,2vw,10px);
            background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
            color:var(--white);padding:5px 9px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;
        }
        @media(min-width:640px){.side-close-btn{display:none}}

        .s-tlbl{font-size:clamp(6px,1.6vw,8px);color:var(--pink-light);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:3px}
        .s-pname{font-size:clamp(10px,2.8vw,14px);color:var(--gold);text-shadow:2px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);word-break:break-all}
        .s-tnum{font-size:clamp(5px,1.4vw,7px);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-top:2px}

        .side-main{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:0}

        /* En móvil el dado y acciones van en fila para aprovechar el espacio horizontal */
        .side-ctrl{display:flex;flex-direction:row;flex-shrink:0}
        @media(min-width:640px){.side-ctrl{flex-direction:column}}

        .dice-sec{
            flex:0 0 auto;
            padding:clamp(8px,2vw,12px) clamp(10px,2.5vw,14px);
            border-right:2px solid rgba(244,167,195,0.15);
        }
        @media(min-width:640px){
            .dice-sec{border-right:none;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(244,167,195,0.15)}
        }

        .s-sec-t{font-size:clamp(6px,1.6vw,8px);color:var(--pink);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:7px}

        .dice-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px}
        .dice{
            width:clamp(48px,9vw,64px);height:clamp(48px,9vw,64px);
            background:var(--white);border:3px solid var(--pink-dark);
            box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 #E8D0E0,inset 3px 3px 0 #FFF8FF,0 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            font-size:clamp(22px,5.5vw,32px);cursor:pointer;transition:transform .05s;
            clip-path:polygon(6px 0%,calc(100% - 6px) 0%,100% 6px,100% calc(100% - 6px),calc(100% - 6px) 100%,6px 100%,0% calc(100% - 6px),0% 6px)
        }
        .dice:active{transform:scale(.9)}
        .dice.rolling{animation:dRoll .5s ease}
        @keyframes dRoll{0%{transform:rotate(0) scale(1.1)}25%{transform:rotate(-15deg) scale(.95)}50%{transform:rotate(15deg) scale(1.05)}75%{transform:rotate(-8deg) scale(.97)}100%{transform:rotate(0) scale(1)}}
        .ap-row{display:flex;gap:3px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
        .ap-pip{width:clamp(10px,2vw,14px);height:clamp(10px,2vw,14px);background:var(--pink);box-shadow:inset -2px -2px 0 var(--pink-dark),inset 2px 2px 0 var(--pink-light);clip-path:polygon(2px 0%,calc(100% - 2px) 0%,100% 2px,100% calc(100% - 2px),calc(100% - 2px) 100%,2px 100%,0% calc(100% - 2px),0% 2px)}
        .ap-pip.used{background:#333;box-shadow:inset -2px -2px 0 #111,inset 2px 2px 0 #555}
        .ap-lbl{font-size:clamp(6px,1.5vw,8px);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);text-align:center}

        .act-sec{flex:1;padding:clamp(8px,2vw,12px) clamp(10px,2.5vw,14px)}
        .act-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:clamp(6px,1.5vw,9px)}
        .act-btn{font-family:var(--px);font-size:clamp(7px,2vw,10px);padding:clamp(9px,2vw,12px) 10px;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--white);text-align:left;position:relative;transition:transform .05s}
        .act-btn:active:not(:disabled){transform:translateY(2px)}
        .act-btn:disabled{opacity:.35;cursor:not-allowed}
        .aa{background:var(--rose);box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 var(--rose-dark),inset 3px 3px 0 #FF7A9A,0 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}
        .aa:not(:disabled):hover{background:#FF7A9A;color:var(--black)}
        .as{background:var(--sky-dark);box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 #1A5A7E,inset 3px 3px 0 var(--sky-light),0 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}
        .as:not(:disabled):hover{background:var(--sky-light);color:var(--black)}
        .ae{background:#4A4060;box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 #2A2040,inset 3px 3px 0 #6A6080,0 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5);margin-top:2px}
        .ae:hover{background:#6A6080}
        .act-cost{position:absolute;right:6px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:clamp(6px,1.5vw,8px);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.4);padding:2px 5px}

        .glog{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px 9px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;min-height:0}
        .log-e{font-size:clamp(6px,1.5vw,7.5px);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);line-height:2;padding:4px 6px;border-left:2px solid var(--pink-dark);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04)}
        .log-e.lc{border-color:var(--rose);color:#FFB0B0}
        .log-e.lq{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}
        .log-e.ls{border-color:#555;color:#999}

        /* Botones de territorio sobre el mapa */
        .terr-btn{position:absolute;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--px);background:none;border:none;transition:transform .1s,filter .1s}
        .terr-btn:active{transform:scale(1.08);filter:brightness(1.2)}
        .t-lbl{font-size:clamp(6px,1.8vw,8px);background:rgba(26,16,32,0.9);color:var(--white);padding:4px 8px;border:2px solid var(--pink);box-shadow:2px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5);pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap}
        /* Estadísticas limpias sin emojis */
        .t-stats{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;font-size:clamp(5px,1.4vw,7px);background:rgba(26,16,32,0.9);padding:3px 7px;border:1px solid rgba(244,167,195,0.4);pointer-events:none}
        .t-stat-row{display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center}
        .t-stat-lbl{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);letter-spacing:0.5px}
        .t-stat-val{color:var(--gold);font-weight:bold}
        .t-stat-val.stab{color:var(--pink-light)}

        /* ══ MODALS ══ */
        .overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:200;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.9);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:12px}
        .overlay.active{display:flex}
        .modal{background:#FFF8F8;border:4px solid var(--pink);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--rose-dark),8px 8px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5);padding:clamp(18px,4vw,28px) clamp(14px,3.5vw,26px);width:min(460px,96vw);max-height:88vh;position:relative;overflow-y:auto;clip-path:polygon(10px 0%,calc(100% - 10px) 0%,100% 10px,100% calc(100% - 10px),calc(100% - 10px) 100%,10px 100%,0% calc(100% - 10px),0% 10px)}
        .modal-dark{background:#1A1020;border-color:var(--pink)}
        .m-title{font-size:clamp(9px,3vw,13px);color:var(--rose-dark);text-align:center;margin-bottom:14px;line-height:1.8}
        .m-title.dark{color:var(--gold)}
        .m-text{font-size:clamp(8px,2.2vw,10px);color:#2A1A10;text-align:center;line-height:2.4;margin-bottom:14px}
        .m-text.dark{color:var(--pink-light)}
        .m-text b{color:var(--rose)}
        .m-btns{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
        .ti-row{display:flex;gap:14px;justify-content:center;margin:14px 0;flex-wrap:wrap}
        .ti-box{background:#F0E0F0;border:3px solid var(--pink-dark);padding:12px 18px;text-align:center}
        .ti-lbl{font-size:clamp(6px,1.6vw,8px);color:var(--rose-dark);margin-bottom:6px}
        .ti-val{font-size:clamp(20px,5vw,28px);color:var(--black)}
        .sel-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;max-height:clamp(140px,35vh,220px);overflow-y:auto}
        .sel-item{font-family:var(--px);font-size:clamp(7px,2vw,9px);padding:clamp(10px,2.2vw,13px) clamp(12px,3vw,16px);cursor:pointer;border:2px solid var(--pink-dark);background:#FFF0F8;color:var(--black);text-align:left;line-height:1.8}
        .sel-item:active{background:var(--pink-light)}
        .newton-box{background:#0A1A2A;border:2px solid var(--sky-dark);padding:8px 11px;margin:9px 0;font-size:clamp(6px,1.5vw,7.5px);color:#7CFFB0;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;line-height:2;max-height:clamp(70px,20vh,100px);overflow-y:auto;text-align:left}
        .res-badge{text-align:center;padding:12px;margin:9px 0;font-size:clamp(10px,3vw,14px);border:3px solid}
        .res-badge.fallido{color:#AAA;border-color:#666;background:#1A1A1A}
        .res-badge.efectivo{color:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold-dark);background:#1A1500}
        .res-badge.devastador{color:var(--rose);border-color:var(--rose-dark);background:#1A0010}
        .res-det{font-size:clamp(6px,1.6vw,8px);color:#CCC;line-height:2.2;text-align:center;margin-top:5px;white-space:pre-line}
        .turn-msg{background:#0A0A1A;border:4px solid var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--gold-dark),0 0 30px rgba(240,192,64,0.3);padding:clamp(20px,4vw,30px) clamp(22px,5vw,36px);text-align:center;width:min(400px,94vw)}
        .tm-icon{margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;justify-content:center}
        .tm-name{font-size:clamp(10px,3vw,14px);color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.8}
        .tm-msg{font-size:clamp(7px,2vw,9px);color:var(--pink-light);line-height:2.4}

        /* ══ VICTORIA ══ */
        #s-victoria{background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,#2A0A30,#0A0010);overflow:hidden}
        .vic-stars{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none}
        .vic-content{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:clamp(12px,3vh,20px);text-align:center;padding:20px}
        .vic-icon{font-size:clamp(52px,12vw,80px);animation:vPop 1s ease-out;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 20px var(--gold))}
        @keyframes vPop{from{transform:scale(0) rotate(-20deg)}to{transform:scale(1) rotate(0)}}
        .vic-crown{font-size:clamp(8px,2.5vw,12px);color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:3px;animation:fIn .8s .3s both}
        .vic-player{font-size:clamp(16px,5vw,32px);color:var(--pink-light);line-height:1.5;animation:fIn .8s .6s both;text-shadow:3px 3px var(--rose-dark)}
        .vic-reached{font-size:clamp(7px,2vw,10px);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);animation:fIn .8s .9s both;letter-spacing:2px}
        .vic-title{font-size:clamp(20px,6vw,44px);color:var(--gold);text-shadow:4px 4px var(--gold-dark),6px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);animation:glow 2s ease-in-out infinite,fIn .8s 1.2s both}
        .vic-btn{animation:fIn .8s 1.8s both}
        @keyframes fIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

        ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#1A1020}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--pink-dark)}
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ══ S1: INICIO ══ -->
<div class="screen active" id="s-inicio">
    <svg id="sword-bg" viewBox="0 0 400 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice">
        <defs>
            <pattern id="sp" x="0" y="0" width="100" height="100" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                <g transform="translate(26,26) rotate(45)">
                    <rect x="-2.5" y="-34" width="5" height="52" fill="#F4A7C3"/>
                    <rect x="-9" y="12" width="18" height="4" fill="#F0C040"/>
                    <rect x="-1.5" y="16" width="3" height="14" fill="#D4729A"/>
                    <polygon points="0,-34 -3.5,-24 3.5,-24" fill="#FFF0FF"/>
                </g>
                <g transform="translate(76,76) rotate(-45)">
                    <rect x="-2.5" y="-34" width="5" height="52" fill="#F4A7C3"/>
                    <rect x="-9" y="12" width="18" height="4" fill="#F0C040"/>
                    <rect x="-1.5" y="16" width="3" height="14" fill="#D4729A"/>
                    <polygon points="0,-34 -3.5,-24 3.5,-24" fill="#FFF0FF"/>
                </g>
                <text x="6" y="14" font-size="7" fill="#F4A7C3">✦</text>
                <text x="82" y="92" font-size="7" fill="#F4A7C3">✦</text>
                <text x="46" y="52" font-size="5" fill="#F0C040">★</text>
            </pattern>
        </defs>
        <rect width="400" height="400" fill="url(#sp)"/>
    </svg>
    <div class="inicio-content">
        <div class="title-frame">
            <div class="title-main">Gran<br>Conquista</div>
        </div>
        <div class="menu-btns">
            <button class="btn btn-pink" onclick="showScreen('s-players')"> Jugar</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sky" onclick="showScreen('s-libro-cerrado')"> Guía del Conquistador</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ S2: LIBRO CERRADO ══ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-libro-cerrado" onclick="openBook()">
    <div class="book-closed-wrap">
        <svg class="book-float" viewBox="0 0 220 280" style="width:clamp(150px,38vw,210px);height:auto">
            <rect x="18" y="8" width="184" height="252" rx="4" fill="#5C3A1E"/>
            <rect x="18" y="8" width="26" height="252" rx="2" fill="#3B2110"/>
            <rect x="50" y="24" width="138" height="196" rx="2" fill="#4A2A10"/>
            <rect x="60" y="34" width="118" height="176" fill="none" stroke="#F4A7C3" stroke-width="2.5"/>
            <rect x="67" y="41" width="104" height="162" fill="none" stroke="#F4A7C3" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/>
            <circle cx="119" cy="124" r="30" fill="#D4729A"/>
            <circle cx="119" cy="124" r="22" fill="#F4A7C3"/>
            <text x="119" y="132" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#1A1020">✦</text>
            <rect x="46" y="230" width="148" height="26" fill="#C89020"/>
            <rect x="48" y="232" width="144" height="22" fill="none" stroke="#F0C040" stroke-width="1"/>
            <rect x="181" y="112" width="18" height="12" rx="2" fill="#C89020"/>
            <rect x="183" y="114" width="14" height="8" rx="1" fill="#F0C040"/>
            <rect x="200" y="12" width="7" height="244" fill="#FFF8E0"/>
            <g stroke="#E8D0A0" stroke-width="1">
                <line x1="200" y1="28" x2="207" y2="28"/><line x1="200" y1="44" x2="207" y2="44"/><line x1="200" y1="60" x2="207" y2="60"/>
                <line x1="200" y1="76" x2="207" y2="76"/><line x1="200" y1="92" x2="207" y2="92"/><line x1="200" y1="108" x2="207" y2="108"/>
                <line x1="200" y1="124" x2="207" y2="124"/><line x1="200" y1="140" x2="207" y2="140"/><line x1="200" y1="156" x2="207" y2="156"/>
                <line x1="200" y1="172" x2="207" y2="172"/><line x1="200" y1="188" x2="207" y2="188"/><line x1="200" y1="204" x2="207" y2="204"/>
                <line x1="200" y1="220" x2="207" y2="220"/><line x1="200" y1="236" x2="207" y2="236"/>
            </g>
        </svg>
        <div class="guide-title">Guía del Conquistador</div>
        <div class="click-hint">— toca para abrir —</div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ S3: LIBRO ABIERTO ══ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-libro-abierto">
    <div class="book-wrap">
        <div class="bk-left">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 110" style="width:clamp(60px,12vw,90px);height:auto">
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="44" fill="#F4A7C3"/>
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="36" fill="#D4729A"/>
                <text x="50" y="60" text-anchor="middle" font-size="30" fill="#1A1020">⚔</text>
                <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="44" fill="none" stroke="#C89020" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="7 4"/>
            </svg>
            <div class="bk-l-title">GUÍA DEL<br>CONQUISTADOR</div>
            <div class="bk-l-deco">Gran Conquista</div>
            <div class="bk-nav" style="justify-content:center">
                <button class="bk-btn bk-btn-sky" onclick="showScreen('s-inicio')">← Inicio</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="bk-right">
            <div id="book-index">
                <div class="idx-title">ÍNDICE DE LA GUÍA</div>
                <button class="idx-item" onclick="showGuide('turno')">El Turno de Batalla</button>
                <button class="idx-item" onclick="showGuide('refuerzos')">Los Refuerzos</button>
                <button class="idx-item" onclick="showGuide('deterioro')">El Deterioro</button>
                <button class="idx-item" onclick="showGuide('dado')">El Dado Sagrado</button>
                <button class="idx-item" onclick="showGuide('ataque')">El Sistema de Ataque</button>
                <button class="idx-item" onclick="showGuide('newton')">La Magia de Newton</button>
                <button class="idx-item" onclick="showGuide('conquista')">La Conquista</button>
                <button class="idx-item" onclick="showGuide('victoria')">Cómo Ganar</button>
            </div>
            <div id="book-content" style="display:none">
                <div id="book-content-inner"></div>
                <div class="bk-nav">
                    <button class="bk-btn bk-btn-pink" onclick="showIndex()">← Índice</button>
                    <button class="bk-btn bk-btn-sky" onclick="showScreen('s-inicio')">⌂ Inicio</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ S4: JUGADORES ══ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-players">
    <div class="pl-wrap">
        <div class="pl-half pl-1">
            <svg class="cmd" viewBox="0 0 130 160" style="width:clamp(90px,18vw,130px);height:auto">
                <rect x="50" y="24" width="30" height="12" fill="#2A7ABE"/>
                <rect x="46" y="32" width="38" height="38" fill="#FFCCA0"/>
                <rect x="44" y="38" width="42" height="8" fill="#1A5A9E" opacity="0.5"/>
                <rect x="52" y="42" width="8" height="6" fill="#1A1020"/>
                <rect x="70" y="42" width="8" height="6" fill="#1A1020"/>
                <rect x="42" y="70" width="46" height="42" fill="#2A7ABE"/>
                <rect x="46" y="74" width="38" height="30" fill="#3A8ACE"/>
                <rect x="48" y="76" width="34" height="26" fill="none" stroke="#60AAEE" stroke-width="2"/>
                <rect x="20" y="74" width="22" height="12" fill="#2A7ABE"/>
                <rect x="88" y="74" width="22" height="12" fill="#2A7ABE"/>
                <rect x="16" y="72" width="18" height="28" rx="2" fill="#2A6AAE"/>
                <rect x="18" y="74" width="14" height="24" rx="1" fill="none" stroke="#60AAEE" stroke-width="2"/>
                <rect x="52" y="112" width="12" height="30" fill="#1A5A9E"/>
                <rect x="70" y="112" width="12" height="30" fill="#1A5A9E"/>
                <rect x="50" y="140" width="16" height="10" fill="#1A2A4A"/>
                <rect x="68" y="140" width="16" height="10" fill="#1A2A4A"/>
                <rect x="96" y="26" width="5" height="60" fill="#C0C0D0"/>
                <rect x="90" y="60" width="16" height="4" fill="#C89020"/>
                <polygon points="98,20 94,26 102,26" fill="#D0D0E0"/>
            </svg>
            <div class="pl-label">CABALLERO AZUL</div>
            <input class="pl-input" id="p1-name" placeholder="Tu nombre..." maxlength="14"/>
        </div>
        <div class="pl-divh"></div>
        <div class="pl-divv"></div>
        <div class="pl-half pl-2">
            <svg class="cmd cmd2" viewBox="0 0 130 160" style="width:clamp(90px,18vw,130px);height:auto">
                <rect x="50" y="22" width="30" height="12" fill="#C03070"/>
                <rect x="46" y="30" width="38" height="38" fill="#FFCCA0"/>
                <path d="M44 30 Q65 18 86 30" fill="#8B2040"/>
                <rect x="44" y="38" width="42" height="8" fill="#A02060" opacity="0.5"/>
                <rect x="52" y="42" width="8" height="6" fill="#1A1020"/>
                <rect x="70" y="42" width="8" height="6" fill="#1A1020"/>
                <path d="M42 70 L65 64 L88 70 L88 98 Q65 104 42 98 Z" fill="#D03080"/>
                <path d="M48 72 L65 68 L82 72 L82 92 Q65 98 48 92 Z" fill="#E84A9A"/>
                <rect x="20" y="74" width="22" height="12" fill="#D03080"/>
                <rect x="88" y="74" width="22" height="12" fill="#D03080"/>
                <rect x="16" y="72" width="18" height="28" rx="2" fill="#A02060"/>
                <rect x="18" y="74" width="14" height="24" rx="1" fill="none" stroke="#FFB0D0" stroke-width="2"/>
                <rect x="52" y="112" width="12" height="30" fill="#6B0A30"/>
                <rect x="70" y="112" width="12" height="30" fill="#6B0A30"/>
                <rect x="50" y="140" width="16" height="10" fill="#3A0A20"/>
                <rect x="68" y="140" width="16" height="10" fill="#3A0A20"/>
                <rect x="96" y="26" width="4" height="60" fill="#C0C0D0"/>
                <rect x="90" y="60" width="14" height="4" fill="#C89020"/>
                <polygon points="98,20 94,26 101,26" fill="#D0D0E0"/>
            </svg>
            <div class="pl-label">CABALLERO ROSA</div>
            <input class="pl-input" id="p2-name" placeholder="Tu nombre..." maxlength="14"/>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="start-wrap">
        <button class="btn btn-gold" onclick="startGame()">A la Batalla!</button>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ S5: JUEGO ══ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-game">

    <!-- Flecha volver -->
    <button class="back-arrow" onclick="showScreen('s-inicio')" title="Volver al inicio">←</button>

    <!-- MAPA: ocupa todo el espacio flex restante -->
    <div class="gmap">
        <!-- Chip de turno sobre el mapa -->
        <div class="map-player-chip">
            <div class="mpc-label">TURNO</div>
            <div class="mpc-name" id="mpc-name">—</div>
            <div class="mpc-round" id="mpc-round">T1/30</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Botón para abrir panel (solo móvil) -->
        <button class="panel-toggle" onclick="togglePanel()">Panel ▲</button>

        <svg id="gmap-svg" viewBox="0 0 800 560" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
            <defs>
                <radialGradient id="mg" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="60%">
                    <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5AAA4A"/>
                    <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#2A6A2A"/>
                </radialGradient>
                <pattern id="grass" x="0" y="0" width="8" height="8" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
                    <rect width="8" height="8" fill="none"/>
                    <circle cx="2" cy="3" r="0.6" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"/>
                    <circle cx="6" cy="6" r="0.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.04)"/>
                </pattern>
            </defs>
            <rect width="800" height="560" fill="url(#mg)"/>
            <rect width="800" height="560" fill="url(#grass)"/>
            <rect x="3" y="3" width="794" height="554" fill="none" stroke="#F4A7C3" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="10 5" opacity="0.5"/>
            <g id="terr-shapes"></g>
        </svg>
        <div id="terr-overlay" style="position:absolute;inset:0"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- PANEL LATERAL -->
    <div class="gside" id="gside">
        <div class="side-hdr">
            <div class="side-hdr-text">
                <div class="s-tlbl">TURNO ACTUAL</div>
                <div class="s-pname" id="s-pname">—</div>
                <div class="s-tnum" id="s-tnum">Ronda 1</div>
            </div>
            <button class="side-close-btn" onclick="togglePanel()">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="side-main">
            <div class="side-ctrl">
                <div class="dice-sec">
                    <div class="s-sec-t">Dado Sagrado</div>
                    <div class="dice-wrap">
                        <div class="dice" id="dice-el" onclick="rollDice()">?</div>
                        <div class="ap-lbl" id="ap-lbl">Toca para tirar</div>
                        <div class="ap-row" id="ap-row"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="act-sec">
                    <div class="s-sec-t">Acciones</div>
                    <div class="act-list">
                        <button class="act-btn aa" id="btn-atk" disabled onclick="openAttack()">ATACAR<span class="act-cost">2p</span></button>
                        <button class="act-btn as" id="btn-stb" disabled onclick="openStabilize()">ESTABILIZAR<span class="act-cost">1p</span></button>
                        <button class="act-btn ae" onclick="endTurn()">Fin de Turno</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div style="padding:6px 9px 2px;flex-shrink:0"><div class="s-sec-t">Cronica de Batalla</div></div>
            <div class="glog" id="glog"></div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ VICTORIA ══ -->
<div class="screen" id="s-victoria">
    <div class="vic-stars" id="vic-stars"></div>
    <div class="vic-content">
        <div class="vic-icon"></div>
        <div class="vic-crown">✦  GLORIA ETERNA  ✦</div>
        <div class="vic-player" id="vic-pname">—</div>
        <div class="vic-reached">ha alcanzado...</div>
        <div class="vic-title">Gran Conquista</div>
        <button class="btn btn-pink vic-btn" onclick="showScreen('s-inicio')">Jugar de Nuevo</button>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ MODALS ══ -->
<div class="overlay" id="ov-turn"><div class="turn-msg">
    <div class="tm-icon" id="tm-icon">⚔</div>
    <div class="tm-name" id="tm-name">—</div>
    <div class="tm-msg" id="tm-msg">—</div>
    <br><button class="btn btn-gold btn-sm" id="tm-btn">A la batalla!</button>
</div></div>

<div class="overlay" id="ov-terr"><div class="modal">
    <div class="m-title" id="ot-title">—</div>
    <div class="m-text" id="ot-owner">—</div>
    <div class="ti-row">
        <div class="ti-box"><div class="ti-lbl">TROPAS</div><div class="ti-val" id="ot-troops">—</div></div>
        <div class="ti-box"><div class="ti-lbl">ESTABILIDAD</div><div class="ti-val" id="ot-stab">—</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="m-btns"><button class="btn btn-pink btn-sm" onclick="closeOv('ov-terr')">Cerrar</button></div>
</div></div>

<div class="overlay" id="ov-src"><div class="modal modal-dark">
    <div class="m-title dark">TERRITORIO ATACANTE</div>
    <div class="sel-list" id="src-list"></div>
    <br><div class="m-btns"><button class="btn btn-sky btn-sm" onclick="closeOv('ov-src')">Cancelar</button></div>
</div></div>

<div class="overlay" id="ov-tgt"><div class="modal modal-dark">
    <div class="m-title dark">ELEGIR OBJETIVO</div>
    <div class="m-text dark">Desde: <b id="atk-from">—</b></div>
    <div class="sel-list" id="tgt-list"></div>
    <br><div class="m-btns"><button class="btn btn-sky btn-sm" onclick="closeOv('ov-tgt')">Cancelar</button></div>
</div></div>

<div class="overlay" id="ov-stb"><div class="modal modal-dark">
    <div class="m-title dark">ESTABILIZAR</div>
    <div class="m-text dark" id="stb-info">—</div>
    <div class="sel-list" id="stb-list"></div>
    <br><div class="m-btns"><button class="btn btn-sky btn-sm" onclick="closeOv('ov-stb')">Cancelar</button></div>
</div></div>

<div class="overlay" id="ov-combat"><div class="modal modal-dark">
    <div class="m-title dark">RESULTADO DEL COMBATE</div>
    <div class="m-text dark" id="cb-header">—</div>
    <div class="newton-box" id="newton-steps"></div>
    <div class="res-badge" id="res-badge">—</div>
    <div class="res-det" id="res-det">—</div>
    <br><div class="m-btns"><button class="btn btn-gold btn-sm" onclick="closeCombat()">Continuar</button></div>
</div></div>

<div class="overlay" id="ov-det"><div class="modal modal-dark">
    <div class="m-title dark">DETERIORO</div>
    <div class="m-text dark" id="det-info">—</div>
    <div class="m-btns"><button class="btn btn-gold btn-sm" id="det-btn">Continuar</button></div>
</div></div>

<div class="overlay" id="ov-rf"><div class="modal modal-dark">
    <div class="m-title dark">REFUERZOS LLEGAN</div>
    <div class="m-text dark" id="rf-info">—</div>
    <div class="sel-list" id="rf-list"></div>
</div></div>

<script>
    /* ══ DATA ══ */
    const TERRS=[{id:0,name:'Valdris'},{id:1,name:'Eryndel'},{id:2,name:'Korrath'},{id:3,name:'Myravel'},{id:4,name:'Ashfen'},{id:5,name:'Solmere'}];

    const TPOS=[
        {l:'8%',  t:'8%'},
        {l:'38%', t:'5%'},
        {l:'67%', t:'8%'},
        {l:'8%',  t:'52%'},
        {l:'38%', t:'55%'},
        {l:'67%', t:'52%'},
    ];

    const DET=[0,5,7,10,12,15,15], STBT=[0,4,7,10,12,16,16];
    const DE=['','1','2','3','4','5','6'];
    const OC=[
        {fill:'rgba(30,100,180,0.82)',stroke:'#8ADAFF'},
        {fill:'rgba(180,40,100,0.82)',stroke:'#FFA0C8'},
    ];
    const TM=["Las huestes de {n} marchan al frente. Que los cielos os favorezcan!","Es la hora de la gloria, {n}. El destino del reino esta en vuestras manos!","Los tambores de guerra resuenan para {n}! Que ningun enemigo se interponga!","El oraculo ha hablado: es el turno de {n}. Avanzad sin temor!","Las estrellas guian a {n} hacia la victoria! Adelante, noble guerrero!"];
    const FM=["Los dioses no favorecen el ataque hoy, {n}... La retirada es sabia.","El enemigo resiste! Las fuerzas de {n} retroceden con perdidas.","Una derrota amarga, {n}. Los grandes guerreros aprenden del fracaso."];
    const EM=["Las tropas de {n} avanzan con fiereza! El enemigo sangra.","Un golpe certero de {n}! El territorio enemigo tiembla.","¡{n} demuestra su valia en el campo de batalla!"];
    const DVM=["VICTORIA APLASTANTE! Las fuerzas de {n} arrasan sin piedad. Los dioses rugen!","Devastacion total! {n} ha sembrado el terror en las filas enemigas.","El poder de {n} es incontestable! El enemigo huye despavorido."];
    const CM=["{n} conquista {t}! La bandera de la gloria ondea en el horizonte.","{t} cae ante {n}! Otro territorio se rinde a su poderio.","La Gran Conquista avanza! {n} toma control de {t}."];
    const HDM=["Un {d}! Los astros bendicen a {n} esta jornada!","Glorioso {d}! El dado sagrado sonrie a {n}!"];
    const LDM=["Un {d}... Los vientos no son favorables hoy para {n}.","Un {d}! El destino pone a prueba la paciencia de {n}."];

    function pm(a,v={}){let m=a[Math.floor(Math.random()*a.length)];for(const[k,val]of Object.entries(v))m=m.replaceAll(`{${k}}`,val);return m}

    /* ══ STATE ══ */
    let G={};
    function initState(p1,p2){G={players:[{name:p1||'Guerrero'},{name:p2||'Conquistadora'}],territories:TERRS.map((t,i)=>({...t,owner:i<3?0:1,troops:15,stab:50})),cp:0,total:0,ap:0,rolled:false,dv:0,pc:[]}}

    /* ══ NEWTON ══ */
    function newton(A){
        const s=[];if(A<=0)return{x:0,s,ok:false};
        let x=A/2;
        for(let i=0;i<50;i++){
            const fx=Math.log(1+x)+x-A,fp=1/(1+x)+1,xn=x-fx/fp;
            s.push(`x${i} = ${x.toFixed(5)}   f(x) = ${fx.toFixed(5)}`);
            if(Math.abs(xn-x)<0.0001){s.push(`x${i+1} = ${xn.toFixed(5)}  convergio`);return{x:xn,s,ok:true}}
            x=xn;
        }
        return{x,s,ok:true};
    }
    function cls(x){return x<1.2?'fallido':x<2.8?'efectivo':'devastador'}

    /* ══ UI ══ */
    function showScreen(id){
        document.querySelectorAll('.screen').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));
        document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
    }
    function openOv(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active')}
    function closeOv(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('active')}
    function addLog(m,c=''){const l=document.getElementById('glog'),e=document.createElement('div');e.className='log-e '+c;e.textContent=m;l.prepend(e)}

    /* Toggle panel (solo activo en móvil) */
    let panelOpen=false;
    function togglePanel(){
        panelOpen=!panelOpen;
        const panel=document.getElementById('gside');
        const btn=document.querySelector('.panel-toggle');
        if(panelOpen){
            panel.classList.add('open');
            btn.textContent='Panel ▼';
        }else{
            panel.classList.remove('open');
            btn.textContent='Panel ▲';
        }
    }

    /* ══ BOOK ══ */
    function openBook(){showScreen('s-libro-abierto');showIndex()}
    function showIndex(){document.getElementById('book-index').style.display='block';document.getElementById('book-content').style.display='none'}
    const GD={
        turno:{title:'El Turno de Batalla',text:`Cada turno tiene <b>4 fases</b>:<br><br><b>Refuerzos</b> — recibes tropas nuevas<br><b>Deterioro</b> — un territorio tuyo pierde estabilidad al azar<br><b>Dado Sagrado</b> — tiras 1d6 para obtener puntos de accion<br><b>Acciones</b> — gastas los puntos en atacar o estabilizar<br><br>Luego el turno pasa al rival.`},
        refuerzos:{title:'Los Refuerzos',text:`Al inicio de tu turno recibes tropas:<br><br><b>Tropas = 2 × territorios que controlas</b><br><br>1 territorio → 2 tropas<br>2 territorios → 4 tropas<br>3 territorios → 6 tropas<br><br>Se asignan a <b>un unico territorio</b> tuyo.`},
        deterioro:{title:'El Deterioro',text:`Un territorio tuyo elegido al <b>azar</b> pierde estabilidad cada turno.<br><br>1 territorio → −5<br>2 territorios → −7<br>3 territorios → −10<br>4 territorios → −12<br>5 o 6 territorios → −15<br><br>Mas poder, mas desgaste interno!`},
        dado:{title:'El Dado Sagrado',text:`Tiras <b>1d6</b>. El resultado son tus <b>puntos de accion</b>.<br><br><b>Atacar</b> cuesta 2 puntos<br><b>Estabilizar</b> cuesta 1 punto<br><br>Con dado 1 → solo estabilizas<br>Con dado 6 → puedes atacar 3 veces<br><br>El dado tambien amplifica la fuerza de tus ataques!`},
        ataque:{title:'El Sistema de Ataque',text:`Para atacar necesitas 2 puntos.<br><br>Se calcula la <b>ventaja A</b>:<br>F_atac = (tropas × dado)/10 + estab/100<br>F_def = tropas/10 + estab/100<br>A = F_atac − F_def<br><br>Si A <= 0 → fallas (−1 tropa −8 estab)<br>Si A > 0 → se calcula <b>x</b> con Newton<br><br>x < 1.2 → Fallido<br>1.2 <= x < 2.8 → Efectivo<br>x >= 2.8 → Devastador`},
        newton:{title:'La Magia de Newton',text:`El poder que inviertes en tu ataque (A) no siempre es el dano que recibes. Se utiliza el Metodo de Newton para calcular la Intensidad Real (x) de tu ofensiva.<br><br>Dependiendo de esta intensidad, tu ataque caera en una de estas tres categorias:<br><br><b>Ataque Fallido (x < 1.2)</b><br>Tu estrategia no fue efectiva. Pierdes 1 tropa y 8 de estabilidad.<br><br><b>Ataque Efectivo (1.2 <= x < 2.8)</b><br>Un golpe solido que debilita al enemigo.<br>Dano tropas: x × 2 — Dano estabilidad: x × 10<br><br><b>Ataque Devastador (x >= 2.8)</b><br>Una maniobra maestra! El enemigo sufre grandes perdidas.<br>Dano tropas: x × 3 — Dano estabilidad: x × 15 — Bono: +1 tropa<br><br>Este tipo de ecuaciones no se puede resolver algebraicamente, por eso usamos Metodos Numericos.`},
        conquista:{title:'La Conquista',text:`Un territorio cae cuando:<br><br><b>Tropas <= 0</b><br>o<br><b>Estabilidad <= 0</b><br><br>Al ser conquistado pasa a ser tuyo con:<br>• 3 tropas • 20 de estabilidad<br><br>Debil pero crece con refuerzos!`},
        victoria:{title:'Como Ganar',text:`<b>Victoria directa</b> — controla los 6 territorios<br><br><b>Eliminacion</b> — el rival pierde todos sus territorios<br><br><b>Limite</b> — tras 30 turnos gana quien tenga mas territorios. Empate → mayor suma de tropas + estabilidad.<br><br><b>La Gloria eterna aguarda al vencedor!</b>`},
    };
    function showGuide(k){const g=GD[k];document.getElementById('book-content-inner').innerHTML=`<div class="ct-heading">${g.title}</div><div class="ct-p">${g.text}</div>`;document.getElementById('book-index').style.display='none';document.getElementById('book-content').style.display='block'}

    /* ══ GAME START ══ */
    function startGame(){
        const p1=document.getElementById('p1-name').value.trim()||'Guerrero';
        const p2=document.getElementById('p2-name').value.trim()||'Conquistadora';
        initState(p1,p2);
        panelOpen=false;
        document.getElementById('gside').classList.remove('open');
        document.querySelector('.panel-toggle').textContent='Panel ▲';
        showScreen('s-game');
        renderMap();
        beginTurn();
    }

    /* ══ MAP ══ */
    function renderMap(){renderShapes();renderBtns()}

    // Calcula posiciones y radio en coordenadas de pantalla real del mapa
    function getMapLayout(){
        const mapEl=document.querySelector('.gmap');
        const W=mapEl.offsetWidth||window.innerWidth;
        const H=mapEl.offsetHeight||(window.innerHeight*0.75);
        const cols=3, rows=2;
        const isNarrow = W < H; // pantalla vertical (movil)
        const r = isNarrow
            ? Math.min(W/(cols*2+1)*0.85, H/(rows*2+2)*0.85)
            : Math.min(W/(cols*2+1)*0.8,  H/(rows*2+1)*0.9);
        const padX = (W - cols*(2*r) - (cols-1)*r*0.4) / 2 + r;
        const padY = (H - rows*(2*r) - (rows-1)*r*0.5) / 2 + r;
        const gapX = (W - 2*padX - 2*(2*r)) / 2 + 2*r;
        const gapY = r*2 + r*0.5;
        const positions=[];
        for(let row=0;row<rows;row++){
            for(let col=0;col<cols;col++){
                positions.push({
                    cx: padX + col*gapX,
                    cy: padY + row*gapY
                });
            }
        }
        return {W,H,r,positions};
    }

    function renderShapes(){
        const mapEl=document.querySelector('.gmap');
        const svg=document.getElementById('gmap-svg');
        const {W,H,r,positions}=getMapLayout();

        // Ajustar viewBox al tamaño real
        svg.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
        svg.setAttribute('preserveAspectRatio','xMidYMid meet');

        const shapes=document.getElementById('terr-shapes');
        shapes.innerHTML='';

        G.territories.forEach((t,i)=>{
            const c=OC[t.owner];
            const {cx,cy}=positions[i];

            // Sombra
            const shadow=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
            shadow.setAttribute('cx',cx+3);shadow.setAttribute('cy',cy+4);shadow.setAttribute('r',r);
            shadow.setAttribute('fill','rgba(0,0,0,0.35)');
            shapes.appendChild(shadow);

            // Círculo principal
            const circ=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
            circ.setAttribute('cx',cx);circ.setAttribute('cy',cy);circ.setAttribute('r',r);
            circ.setAttribute('fill',c.fill);
            circ.setAttribute('stroke',c.stroke);
            circ.setAttribute('stroke-width','3');
            shapes.appendChild(circ);

            // Círculo interior decorativo
            const inner=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','circle');
            inner.setAttribute('cx',cx);inner.setAttribute('cy',cy);inner.setAttribute('r',r-10);
            inner.setAttribute('fill','none');
            inner.setAttribute('stroke',c.stroke);
            inner.setAttribute('stroke-width','1.2');
            inner.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray','5 4');
            inner.setAttribute('opacity','0.45');
            shapes.appendChild(inner);

            // Castillo pixelado escalado al radio
            const s=r/82;
            const g2=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','g');
            g2.setAttribute('fill',c.stroke);g2.setAttribute('opacity','0.45');
            [
                [cx-10*s, cy-6*s,  20*s, 10*s],
                [cx-15*s, cy-16*s,  8*s, 12*s],
                [cx+7*s,  cy-16*s,  8*s, 12*s],
                [cx-3*s,  cy-22*s,  6*s,  8*s]
            ].forEach(([x,y,w,h])=>{
                const rect=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','rect');
                rect.setAttribute('x',x);rect.setAttribute('y',y);
                rect.setAttribute('width',w);rect.setAttribute('height',h);
                g2.appendChild(rect);
            });
            shapes.appendChild(g2);
        });
    }

    function renderBtns(){
        const cont=document.getElementById('terr-overlay');cont.innerHTML='';
        const {r,positions}=getMapLayout();

        G.territories.forEach((t,i)=>{
            const c=OC[t.owner];
            const {cx,cy}=positions[i];

            const btn=document.createElement('button');
            btn.className='terr-btn';
            btn.style.left=cx+'px';
            btn.style.top=cy+'px';
            btn.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%)';
            btn.innerHTML=`
                <div class="t-lbl" style="border-color:${c.stroke}">${t.name}</div>
                <div class="t-stats">
                    <div class="t-stat-row"><span class="t-stat-lbl">Tropas</span><span class="t-stat-val">${t.troops}</span></div>
                    <div class="t-stat-row"><span class="t-stat-lbl">Estabilidad</span><span class="t-stat-val stab">${t.stab}</span></div>
                </div>`;
            btn.onclick=()=>openTerrInfo(i);
            cont.appendChild(btn);
        });
    }

    window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{if(G.territories)renderMap()});

    /* ══ TURN ══ */
    function beginTurn(){
        const cp=G.cp,pl=G.players[cp];G.rolled=false;G.ap=0;
        const myT=G.territories.filter(t=>t.owner===cp);
        const bonus=myT.length*2;

        // Calcular deterioro
        let detMsg=null;
        if(myT.length>0){
            const ri=Math.floor(Math.random()*myT.length),dt=myT[ri],loss=DET[myT.length]||5;
            dt.stab=Math.max(0,dt.stab-loss);
            addLog(`Deterioro: ${dt.name} -${loss} estabilidad (-> ${dt.stab})`,'ls');
            detMsg={name:dt.name,loss,stab:dt.stab};
        }
        checkConq();
        document.getElementById('s-pname').textContent=pl.name;
        document.getElementById('s-tnum').textContent=`Ronda ${Math.floor(G.total/2)+1} · T${G.total+1}/30`;
        document.getElementById('mpc-name').textContent=pl.name;
        document.getElementById('mpc-round').textContent=`T${G.total+1}/30`;
        updateDice();updateBtns();

        // Circulo de color del jugador en vez de [A]/[B]
        const tmIcon=document.getElementById('tm-icon');
        tmIcon.innerHTML='';
        const dot=document.createElement('div');
        dot.style.cssText=`width:clamp(36px,9vw,52px);height:clamp(36px,9vw,52px);border-radius:50%;background:${cp===0?'#2A7ABE':'#D03080'};border:4px solid ${cp===0?'#8ADAFF':'#FFA0C8'};box-shadow:0 0 18px ${cp===0?'rgba(42,122,190,0.7)':'rgba(208,48,128,0.7)'};margin:0 auto 8px`;
        tmIcon.appendChild(dot);

        document.getElementById('tm-name').textContent=pl.name;
        document.getElementById('tm-msg').textContent=pm(TM,{n:pl.name});

        // Al cerrar el modal de turno: mostrar deterioro si hay, luego refuerzos
        const b=document.getElementById('tm-btn');
        b.onclick=()=>{
            closeOv('ov-turn');
            if(detMsg){
                // Mostrar aviso de deterioro
                const pColor=cp===0?'#8ADAFF':'#FFA0C8';
                document.getElementById('det-info').innerHTML=
                    `El territorio <b style="color:${pColor}">${detMsg.name}</b> ha sufrido desgaste interno.<br><br>`+
                    `Estabilidad perdida: <b style="color:var(--rose)">-${detMsg.loss}</b><br>`+
                    `Estabilidad actual: <b style="color:var(--gold)">${detMsg.stab}</b>`;
                document.getElementById('det-btn').onclick=()=>{closeOv('ov-det');showRf(cp,bonus)};
                openOv('ov-det');
            } else {
                showRf(cp,bonus);
            }
        };
        openOv('ov-turn');renderMap();
    }

    function showRf(cp,bonus){
        const myT=G.territories.filter(t=>t.owner===cp);
        document.getElementById('rf-info').innerHTML=`Llegan <b>${bonus} tropas</b>! Donde las envias?`;
        const l=document.getElementById('rf-list');l.innerHTML='';
        myT.forEach(t=>{
            const b=document.createElement('button');b.className='sel-item';
            b.textContent=`${t.name} — Tropas: ${t.troops} | Estabilidad: ${t.stab}`;
            b.onclick=()=>{t.troops+=bonus;addLog(`+${bonus} tropas a ${t.name} (-> ${t.troops})`,'ls');closeOv('ov-rf');renderMap()};
            l.appendChild(b);
        });
        openOv('ov-rf');
    }

    function rollDice(){
        if(G.rolled)return;
        const el=document.getElementById('dice-el');el.classList.add('rolling');
        setTimeout(()=>{
            el.classList.remove('rolling');
            G.dv=Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1;G.ap=G.dv;G.rolled=true;
            el.textContent=G.dv;
            const n=G.players[G.cp].name;
            addLog(`${n} saca ${G.dv}. ${pm(G.dv>=5?HDM:LDM,{n,d:G.dv})}`,'ls');
            updateDice();updateBtns();
        },520);
    }

    function updateDice(){
        if(!G.rolled)document.getElementById('dice-el').textContent='?';
        document.getElementById('ap-lbl').textContent=G.rolled?`${G.ap} puntos`:'Toca para tirar';
        const r=document.getElementById('ap-row');r.innerHTML='';
        for(let i=0;i<6;i++){const p=document.createElement('div');p.className='ap-pip'+(i>=G.ap?' used':'');r.appendChild(p)}
    }
    function updateBtns(){
        document.getElementById('btn-atk').disabled=!G.rolled||G.ap<2;
        document.getElementById('btn-stb').disabled=!G.rolled||G.ap<1;
    }
    function spendAP(n){G.ap-=n;updateDice();updateBtns()}

    /* ══ TERRITORY INFO ══ */
    function openTerrInfo(i){
        const t=G.territories[i],c=OC[t.owner];
        document.getElementById('ot-title').textContent=t.name;
        document.getElementById('ot-owner').innerHTML=`Señor: <span style="color:${c.stroke}">${G.players[t.owner].name}</span>`;
        document.getElementById('ot-troops').textContent=t.troops;
        document.getElementById('ot-stab').textContent=t.stab;
        openOv('ov-terr');
    }

    /* ══ ATTACK ══ */
    function openAttack(){
        const cp=G.cp,myT=G.territories.filter(t=>t.owner===cp);
        const l=document.getElementById('src-list');l.innerHTML='';
        myT.forEach(t=>{
            const b=document.createElement('button');b.className='sel-item';
            b.textContent=`${t.name} — Tropas: ${t.troops} | Estabilidad: ${t.stab}`;
            b.onclick=()=>{closeOv('ov-src');pickTarget(t.id)};
            l.appendChild(b);
        });
        openOv('ov-src');
    }

    function pickTarget(sid){
        const src=G.territories[sid];
        document.getElementById('atk-from').textContent=src.name;
        const enemies=G.territories.filter(t=>t.owner!==G.cp);
        const l=document.getElementById('tgt-list');l.innerHTML='';
        enemies.forEach(t=>{
            const b=document.createElement('button');b.className='sel-item';
            b.textContent=`${t.name} — Tropas: ${t.troops} | Estabilidad: ${t.stab}`;
            b.onclick=()=>{closeOv('ov-tgt');execCombat(sid,t.id)};
            l.appendChild(b);
        });
        openOv('ov-tgt');
    }

    function execCombat(si,ti){
        const src=G.territories[si],tgt=G.territories[ti],pl=G.players[G.cp];
        const Fa=(src.troops*G.dv)/10+src.stab/100,Fd=tgt.troops/10+tgt.stab/100,A=Fa-Fd;
        let steps=[
            `F_atac = (${src.troops}x${G.dv})/10 + ${src.stab}/100 = ${Fa.toFixed(3)}`,
            `F_def  = ${tgt.troops}/10 + ${tgt.stab}/100 = ${Fd.toFixed(3)}`,
            `A = ${A.toFixed(4)}`,
            '─────────────────────────────'
        ];
        let rt,rm,det,xv=0;
        if(A<=0){
            rt='fallido';steps.push('A <= 0 -> Ataque cancelado');
            src.troops=Math.max(0,src.troops-1);src.stab=Math.max(0,src.stab-8);
            rm='ATAQUE FALLIDO';det=`${src.name} pierde 1 tropa y 8 estabilidad.`;
            addLog(`${pl.name} ataca ${tgt.name} -> FALLIDO`,'lc');addLog(pm(FM,{n:pl.name}));
        }else{
            const nr=newton(A);xv=nr.x;
            steps.push(...nr.s,'─────────────────────────────',`x = ${xv.toFixed(5)}`);
            const c=cls(xv);
            if(c==='fallido'){
                rt='fallido';rm='ATAQUE FALLIDO';
                src.troops=Math.max(0,src.troops-1);src.stab=Math.max(0,src.stab-8);
                det=`${src.name} pierde 1 tropa y 8 estabilidad.`;
                addLog(`${pl.name} -> FALLIDO (x=${xv.toFixed(2)})`,'lc');addLog(pm(FM,{n:pl.name}));
            }else if(c==='efectivo'){
                rt='efectivo';rm='ATAQUE EFECTIVO';
                const td=Math.floor(xv*2),sd=Math.floor(xv*10);
                tgt.troops=Math.max(0,tgt.troops-td);tgt.stab=Math.max(0,tgt.stab-sd);
                det=`${tgt.name} pierde ${td} tropas y ${sd} estabilidad.\nfloor(${xv.toFixed(2)}x2)=${td}, floor(${xv.toFixed(2)}x10)=${sd}`;
                addLog(`${pl.name} -> EFECTIVO en ${tgt.name} (x=${xv.toFixed(2)}, -${td}t -${sd}e)`,'lc');addLog(pm(EM,{n:pl.name}));
            }else{
                rt='devastador';rm='ATAQUE DEVASTADOR!';
                const td=Math.floor(xv*3),sd=Math.floor(xv*15);
                tgt.troops=Math.max(0,tgt.troops-td);tgt.stab=Math.max(0,tgt.stab-sd);src.troops+=1;
                det=`${tgt.name} pierde ${td} tropas y ${sd} estabilidad.\n${src.name} gana 1 tropa.\nfloor(${xv.toFixed(2)}x3)=${td}, floor(${xv.toFixed(2)}x15)=${sd}`;
                addLog(`${pl.name} -> DEVASTADOR en ${tgt.name} (x=${xv.toFixed(2)})`,'lc');addLog(pm(DVM,{n:pl.name}));
            }
        }
        document.getElementById('cb-header').innerHTML=`<span style="color:#8ADAFF">${src.name}</span> vs <span style="color:#FFA0C8">${tgt.name}</span>`;
        document.getElementById('newton-steps').textContent=steps.join('\n');
        const badge=document.getElementById('res-badge');badge.className='res-badge '+rt;badge.textContent=rm;
        document.getElementById('res-det').textContent=det;
        spendAP(2);G.pc=[];checkConq();openOv('ov-combat');renderMap();
    }

    function closeCombat(){
        closeOv('ov-combat');
        if(G.pc.length>0){
            G.pc.forEach(ti=>{
                const t=G.territories[ti];t.owner=G.cp;t.troops=3;t.stab=20;
                addLog(pm(CM,{n:G.players[G.cp].name,t:t.name}),'lq');
            });
            G.pc=[];renderMap();checkVic();
        }
    }

    function checkConq(){
        G.territories.forEach((t,i)=>{
            if((t.troops<=0||t.stab<=0)&&!G.pc.includes(i))G.pc.push(i)
        });
    }

    function checkVic(){
        const ow=[...new Set(G.territories.map(t=>t.owner))];
        if(ow.length===1){trigVic(ow[0]);return true}
        for(let p=0;p<2;p++){if(G.territories.filter(t=>t.owner===p).length===0){trigVic(1-p);return true}}
        return false;
    }

    function trigVic(pi){
        document.getElementById('vic-pname').textContent=G.players[pi].name;
        spawnStars();setTimeout(()=>showScreen('s-victoria'),300);
    }

    function spawnStars(){
        const c=document.getElementById('vic-stars');c.innerHTML='';
        for(let i=0;i<40;i++){
            const s=document.createElement('div'),sz=Math.random()*14+7;
            s.style.cssText=`position:absolute;left:${Math.random()*100}%;top:${Math.random()*100}%;font-size:${sz}px;color:var(--${['gold','pink','rose'][Math.floor(Math.random()*3)]});animation:fIn ${Math.random()*2+.5}s ${Math.random()*2}s both;opacity:0`;
            s.textContent=['★','✦','✧','♦','✿'][Math.floor(Math.random()*5)];c.appendChild(s);
        }
    }

    /* ══ STABILIZE ══ */
    function openStabilize(){
        const cp=G.cp,myT=G.territories.filter(t=>t.owner===cp),gain=STBT[myT.length]||4;
        document.getElementById('stb-info').innerHTML=`Recupera <b>+${gain} estabilidad</b>`;
        const l=document.getElementById('stb-list');l.innerHTML='';
        myT.forEach(t=>{
            const b=document.createElement('button');b.className='sel-item';
            b.textContent=`${t.name} — Estabilidad: ${t.stab}`;
            b.onclick=()=>{t.stab=Math.min(100,t.stab+gain);addLog(`${G.players[cp].name} estabiliza ${t.name} (+${gain}, -> ${t.stab})`);spendAP(1);closeOv('ov-stb');renderMap()};
            l.appendChild(b);
        });
        openOv('ov-stb');
    }

    /* ══ END TURN ══ */
    function endTurn(){
        G.total++;
        if(G.total>=30){
            const sc=[0,1].map(p=>{const t=G.territories.filter(t=>t.owner===p);return{p,terrs:t.length,tot:t.reduce((a,t)=>a+t.troops+t.stab,0)}});
            let w;
            if(sc[0].terrs!==sc[1].terrs)w=sc[0].terrs>sc[1].terrs?0:1;
            else w=sc[0].tot>=sc[1].tot?0:1;
            trigVic(w);return;
        }
        G.cp=1-G.cp;beginTurn();
    }
</script>
</body>
</html>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <title>Gran Conquista</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Press+Start+2P&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
        :root{
            --sky:#5BC8E8;--sky-dark:#3A9EBE;--sky-light:#A8E4F5;
            --pink:#F4A7C3;--pink-dark:#D4729A;--pink-light:#FFD6E8;
            --rose:#E8527A;--rose-dark:#C03060;
            --gold:#F0C040;--gold-dark:#C89020;
            --black:#1A1020;--white:#FFF8FF;--bg:#0D0816;
            --px:'Press Start 2P',monospace;
            --guide-font: clamp(10px,2.8vw,12px);
            --guide-title-font: clamp(12px,3.4vw,16px);
        }
        html,body{width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg);font-family:var(--px);touch-action:manipulation;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}

        /* ══ SCREENS ══ */
        .screen{position:fixed;inset:0;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden}
        .screen.active{display:flex}

        /* ══ BUTTONS ══ */
        .btn{font-family:var(--px);font-size:clamp(9px,3vw,13px);border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:clamp(12px,3vw,16px) clamp(22px,5vw,38px);position:relative;letter-spacing:1px;transition:transform .06s;min-width:clamp(190px,55vw,250px);text-align:center}
        .btn:active{transform:translateY(3px)}
        .btn-pink{background:var(--pink);color:var(--black);box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 var(--pink-dark),inset 3px 3px 0 var(--pink-light),0 5px 0 var(--rose-dark),0 7px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}
        .btn-pink:hover{background:var(--pink-light)}
        .btn-sky{background:var(--sky-dark);color:var(--white);box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 #2A7A9E,inset 3px 3px 0 var(--sky-light),0 5px 0 #1A5A7E,0 7px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}
        .btn-sky:hover{background:var(--sky-light);color:var(--black)}
        .btn-gold{background:var(--gold);color:var(--black);box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 var(--gold-dark),inset 3px 3px 0 #FFF0A0,0 5px 0 #906010,0 7px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5)}
        .btn-gold:hover{background:#FFF0A0}
        .btn-sm{font-size:clamp(7px,2.2vw,10px);padding:clamp(9px,2.2vw,12px) clamp(14px,3.5vw,20px);min-width:0}
        .btn:disabled{opacity:.4;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none}

        /* ══ S1: INICIO ══ */
        #s-inicio{background:var(--bg)}
        #sword-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;opacity:.12;pointer-events:none}
        .inicio-content{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:clamp(24px,6vh,48px)}
        .title-frame{padding:clamp(22px,5vw,40px) clamp(32px,7vw,70px);text-align:center;position:relative}
        .title-main{font-size:clamp(24px,8vw,56px);color:var(--gold);text-shadow:3px 3px 0 var(--rose-dark),6px 6px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.7);line-height:1.35;animation:glow 3s ease-in-out infinite}
        @keyframes glow{0%,100%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(240,192,64,0.25))}50%{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 24px rgba(240,192,64,0.9))}}
        .menu-btns{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:clamp(12px,3vh,18px);align-items:center}

        /* ══ S2: LIBRO CERRADO ══ */
        #s-libro-cerrado{background:var(--bg);cursor:pointer}
        .book-closed-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:clamp(14px,3vh,24px)}
        .book-float{animation:bookFloat 2.5s ease-in-out infinite}
        @keyframes bookFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px)}}
        .guide-title{font-size:var(--guide-title-font);color:var(--pink-light);text-shadow:2px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.85);text-align:center;line-height:2}
        .click-hint{font-size:clamp(7px,2vw,9px);color:var(--pink);animation:blink 1.2s step-end infinite;letter-spacing:2px}
        @keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}

        /* ══ S3: LIBRO ABIERTO ══ */
        #s-libro-abierto{background:var(--bg);padding:clamp(8px,2vw,16px);overflow-y:auto;justify-content:center;align-items:center}
        .book-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:min(700px,96vw);margin:0 auto}
        @media(min-width:580px){.book-wrap{flex-direction:row;height:min(560px,86vh)}}
        .bk-left{background:#FFF8F0;border:3px solid var(--pink-dark);padding:clamp(14px,3vw,26px) clamp(12px,2.5vw,20px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0}
        @media(min-width:580px){.bk-left{width:36%;border-right:2px solid #D4B080;border-bottom:none}}
        @media(max-width:579px){.bk-left{border-bottom:2px solid #D4B080}}
        .bk-right{flex:1;background:#FFFDF5;border:3px solid var(--pink-dark);border-top:none;padding:clamp(14px,3vw,22px);overflow-y:auto}
        @media(min-width:580px){.bk-right{border-left:none;border-top:3px solid var(--pink-dark)}}
        .bk-l-title{font-size:var(--guide-title-font);color:#5A3010;text-align:center;line-height:2}
        .bk-l-deco{font-size:var(--guide-font);color:var(--pink-dark);text-align:center;line-height:2;margin-top:4px}
        .idx-title{font-size:var(--guide-title-font);color:#5A3010;margin-bottom:12px;text-align:center;line-height:2;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:2px dashed #D4B080}
        .idx-item{display:block;width:100%;font-family:var(--px);font-size:var(--guide-font);color:#3A1A60;padding:clamp(10px,2.3vw,14px) 10px;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;background:none;text-align:left;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:3px}
        .idx-item:hover,.idx-item:active{background:#FFF0E0;border-color:#D4B080;color:#5A3010}
        .idx-item::before{content:'⚔ ';color:var(--rose)}
        .ct-heading{font-size:var(--guide-title-font);color:#5A3010;margin-bottom:12px;line-height:2;border-bottom:2px dashed #D4B080;padding-bottom:6px}
        .ct-p{font-size:var(--guide-font);color:#2A1A10;line-height:2.6;margin-bottom:8px}
        .ct-p b{color:#8B1A1A}
        .bk-nav{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
        .bk-btn{font-family:var(--px);font-size:var(--guide-font);border:none;padding:clamp(8px,1.8vw,11px) clamp(12px,2.5vw,16px);cursor:pointer}
        .bk-btn-pink{background:var(--pink);color:var(--black);box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(--pink-dark)}
        .bk-btn-sky{background:var(--sky-dark);color:var(--white);box-shadow:0 3px 0 #1A5A7E}
        .bk-btn:active{transform:translateY(2px);box-shadow:none}

        /* ══ S4: JUGADORES ══ */
        #s-players{background:var(--black);position:fixed;inset:0;overflow:hidden}
        .pl-wrap{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
        @media(min-width:500px){.pl-wrap{flex-direction:row}}
        .pl-half{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:clamp(12px,3vh,22px);padding:clamp(16px,4vw,40px) clamp(16px,4vw,36px);padding-bottom:clamp(80px,14vh,110px)}
        .pl-1{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0A3A6A,#1A5A9E 60%,#2A7ABE)}
        .pl-2{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#6A0A40,#A02060 60%,#D03080)}
        .pl-divh{width:100%;height:4px;background:var(--black);flex-shrink:0}
        .pl-divv{width:4px;height:100%;background:var(--black);flex-shrink:0}
        @media(min-width:500px){.pl-divh{display:none}}
        @media(max-width:499px){.pl-divv{display:none}}
        .cmd{animation:bobble 2s ease-in-out infinite}
        .cmd2{animation-delay:.6s}
        @keyframes bobble{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}}
        .pl-label{font-size:clamp(10px,3.5vw,16px);letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--pink-light);text-shadow:2px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);text-align:center}
        .pl-input{font-family:var(--px);font-size:clamp(9px,2.8vw,13px);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);border:3px solid var(--pink);color:var(--white);padding:clamp(10px,2.5vw,14px) clamp(12px,3vw,16px);outline:none;width:clamp(170px,50vw,230px);text-align:center}
        .pl-input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);font-size:clamp(6px,1.8vw,9px)}
        .start-wrap{position:fixed;bottom:clamp(16px,4vh,36px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:20;white-space:nowrap}

        /* ══ S5: JUEGO ══ */
        /* En móvil: columna (mapa arriba, panel abajo cuando abre como overlay)
           En escritorio (>=640px): fila (mapa izq, panel der siempre visible) */
        #s-game{
            flex-direction:row;
            align-items:stretch;
            padding:0;
            position:fixed;
            inset:0;
            display:none; /* se activa con .active */
        }
        #s-game.active{display:flex}

        /* Flecha volver */
        .back-arrow{
            position:fixed;top:12px;left:12px;z-index:30;
            width:clamp(36px,8vw,44px);height:clamp(36px,8vw,44px);
            background:rgba(13,8,22,0.88);
            border:2px solid var(--pink);
            box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(--rose-dark),0 5px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            cursor:pointer;font-size:clamp(14px,4vw,20px);
            color:var(--pink-light);transition:transform .06s;
        }
        .back-arrow:active{transform:translateY(3px);box-shadow:0 1px 0 var(--rose-dark)}

        /* ── MAPA ── ocupa todo el espacio restante */
        .gmap{
            flex:1;
            position:relative;
            overflow:hidden;
            background:#0F3A5A;
            min-width:0;
            min-height:0;
        }

        /* Chip turno actual sobre el mapa */
        .map-player-chip{
            position:absolute;top:12px;left:58px;z-index:8;
            background:rgba(13,8,22,0.88);
            border:2px solid var(--gold);
            padding:clamp(5px,1.5vw,8px) clamp(8px,2vw,12px);
            display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:2px;
        }
        .mpc-label{font-size:clamp(5px,1.4vw,7px);color:var(--pink);letter-spacing:1px}
        .mpc-name{font-size:clamp(8px,2.5vw,12px);color:var(--gold)}
        .mpc-round{font-size:clamp(5px,1.3vw,6.5px);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5)}

        /* Botón Panel — solo visible en móvil */
        .panel-toggle{
            position:fixed;
            bottom:14px;right:14px;z-index:20;
            font-family:var(--px);
            font-size:clamp(8px,2.5vw,11px);
            background:rgba(13,8,22,0.92);
            border:2px solid var(--pink);
            color:var(--pink-light);
            padding:clamp(10px,2.5vw,13px) clamp(14px,3.5vw,20px);
            cursor:pointer;
            box-shadow:0 3px 0 var(--rose-dark),0 5px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            transition:transform .06s;
            white-space:nowrap;
            letter-spacing:1px;
        }
        .panel-toggle:active{transform:translateY(3px);box-shadow:0 1px 0 var(--rose-dark)}
        @media(min-width:640px){.panel-toggle{display:none}}

        /* ── PANEL LATERAL ──
           Móvil: overlay desde abajo, oculto por defecto
           Escritorio: sidebar fija a la derecha, siempre visible */
        .gside{
            background:var(--black);
            display:flex;flex-direction:column;
            overflow:hidden;
            flex-shrink:0;
            z-index:25;
        }

        /* MÓVIL: panel como hoja que sube desde abajo */
        @media(max-width:639px){
            .gside{
                position:fixed;
                left:0;right:0;bottom:0;
                height:clamp(260px,50vh,380px);
                border-top:3px solid var(--pink-dark);
                transform:translateY(100%);
                transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
            }
            .gside.open{transform:translateY(0)}
        }

        /* ESCRITORIO: sidebar fija a la derecha, siempre visible */
        @media(min-width:640px){
            .gside{
                width:clamp(230px,28vw,280px);
                border-left:3px solid var(--pink-dark);
                height:100%;
                transform:none !important;
            }
        }

        /* Cabecera del panel */
        .side-hdr{
            background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--rose-dark),var(--rose));
            padding:clamp(8px,2vw,13px);
            border-bottom:2px solid var(--pink);
            flex-shrink:0;
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;
        }
        .side-hdr-text{flex:1;text-align:center}
        .side-close-btn{
            font-family:var(--px);font-size:clamp(7px,2vw,10px);
            background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3);border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
            color:var(--white);padding:5px 9px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;
        }
        @media(min-width:640px){.side-close-btn{display:none}}

        .s-tlbl{font-size:clamp(6px,1.6vw,8px);color:var(--pink-light);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:3px}
        .s-pname{font-size:clamp(10px,2.8vw,14px);color:var(--gold);text-shadow:2px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);word-break:break-all}
        .s-tnum{font-size:clamp(5px,1.4vw,7px);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-top:2px}

        .side-main{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:0}

        /* En móvil el dado y acciones van en fila para aprovechar el espacio horizontal */
        .side-ctrl{display:flex;flex-direction:row;flex-shrink:0}
        @media(min-width:640px){.side-ctrl{flex-direction:column}}

        .dice-sec{
            flex:0 0 auto;
            padding:clamp(8px,2vw,12px) clamp(10px,2.5vw,14px);
            border-right:2px solid rgba(244,167,195,0.15);
        }
        @media(min-width:640px){
            .dice-sec{border-right:none;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(244,167,195,0.15)}
        }

        .s-sec-t{font-size:clamp(6px,1.6vw,8px);color:var(--pink);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:7px}

        .dice-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px}
        .dice{
            width:clamp(48px,9vw,64px);height:clamp(48px,9vw,64px);
            background:var(--white);border:3px solid var(--pink-dark);
            box-shadow:inset -3px -3px 0 #E8D0E0,inset 3px 3px 0 #FFF8FF,0 4px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            font-size:clamp(22px,5.5vw,32px);cursor:pointer;transition:transform .05s;
            clip-path:polygon(6px 0%,calc(100% - 6px) 0%,100% 6px,100% calc(100% - 6px),calc(100% - 6px) 100%,6px 100%,0% calc(100% - 6px),0% 6px)
        }
        .dice:active{transform:scale(.9)}
        .dice.rolling{animation:dRoll .5s ease}
        @keyframes dRoll{0%{transform:rotate(0) scale(1.1)}25%{transform:rotate(-15deg) scale(.95)}50%{transform:rotate(15deg) scale(1.05)}75%{transform:rotate(-8deg) scale(.97)}100%{transform:rotate(0) scale(1)}}
        .ap-row{display:flex;gap:3px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
        .ap-pip{width:clamp(10px,2vw,14px);height:clamp(10px,2vw,14px);background:var(--pink);box-shadow:inset -2px -2px 0 var(--pink-dark),inset 2px 2px 0 var(--pink-light);clip-path:polygon(2px 0%,calc(100% - 2px) 0%,100% 2px,100% calc(100% - 2px),calc(100% - 2px) 100%,2px 100%,0% calc(100% - 2px),0% 2px)}
        .ap-pip.used{background:#333;box-shadow:inset -2px -2px 0 #111,inset 2px 2px 0 #555}
        .ap-lbl{font-size:clamp(6px,1.5vw,8px);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);text-align:center}

        .act-sec{flex:1;padding:clamp(8px,2vw,12px) clamp(10px,2.5vw,14px)}
        .act-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:clamp(6px,1.5vw,9px)}
